title: tragopogon stepposus
intro: Tragopogon stepposus, also known as salsify or goat's beard, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Tragopogon stepposus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
